text:
This page was originally created as a mirror to Statements by Evangelion Staff on EvaWiki, but is no longer maintained. Please see that page.

This article collates Evangelion staff interviews and statements. Gwern's source anthology includes many of these and numerous other sources collected mostly, but not exclusively from EvaGeeks over the years. It has not been updated since 2019 and does not include dozens of new translations (of old and new material) made since then, which are instead collected here. Consider both pages for a complete index of translations. Check out also EvaMonkey's Written Statements page. Please refer to Theory and Analysis:What Is Canon? for the peculiarities in analyzing the hundreds of Evangelion extra-textual materials. The following material is usually considered Tier 2.

This list mostly covers material regarding the original series, D&R, EoE and the manga. For sources concerning Rebuild of Evangelion, particularly the last film, see:

Evangelion 1.0 Complete Records Collection

Evangelion 2.0 Complete Records Collection; and missing parts

Resources:Evangelion Q Records Collection

Evangelion 3.0+1.0 Assorted Translations

This page was originally created as a mirror to Statements by Evangelion Staff on EvaWiki, but is no longer maintained. Please see that page for the most up-to-date version.
